queries.question: What are the prices of Windows 10 tablets and prices of laptops with same operating system?
queries.sql:
SELECT Devices.Price 
FROM Devices
WHERE (Devices.Portable_Computer = "Tablet" OR Devices.Portable_Computer = "Laptop") AND Devices.Operating_System = "Windows 10"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?price WHERE {
  ?devices a :Devices .
  ?devices p:Price ?price .
  ?devices p:Portable_Computer ?portable_computer_w .
  ?devices p:Portable_Computer ?portable_computer_w2 .
  ?devices p:Operating_System ?operating_system_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?portable_computer_w) = "Tablet" || STR(?portable_computer_w2) = "Laptop")) && STR(?operating_system_w) = "Windows 10"))
}

queries.question: List all tablet prices and also list prices of laptops that come with Windows 10.
queries.sql:
SELECT Devices.Price 
FROM Devices
WHERE Devices.Portable_Computer = "Tablet" OR Devices.Portable_Computer = "Laptop" AND Devices.Operating_System = "Windows 10"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?price WHERE {
  ?devices a :Devices .
  ?devices p:Price ?price .
  ?devices p:Portable_Computer ?portable_computer_w .
  ?devices p:Portable_Computer ?portable_computer_w2 .
  ?devices p:Operating_System ?operating_system_w .
  FILTER((STR(?portable_computer_w) = "Tablet" || (STR(?portable_computer_w2) = "Laptop" && STR(?operating_system_w) = "Windows 10")))
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: What are the prices of tablets and laptops that come with Windows 10?
